title: The Brauer-Manin obstruction of Symmetric products
author_string: Yongqi Liang, Xingyu Liu, Hui Zhang
abstract: This article focuses on smooth, projective, and geometrically integral varieties $X$ over a field $k$, whose geometric Picard group $Pic(X_{\overline{k}})$ is torsion-free. We establish an isomorphism$Br(X)/Br(k) \simeq Br_{nr}\bigl(Sym_{X/k}^{n}\bigr)/Br(k)$, where $Sym_{X/k}^{n}$ denotes the $n$-th symmetric product. Using this isomorphism, we investigate the relationship between the Brauer--Manin obstruction to the Hasse principle and weak approximation for rational points on the smooth proejctive model $Sym_{X/k}^{n,sm}$, and the corresponding obstruction for $0$-cycles of degree $n$ on $X$.
